Use with caution."},"swapCount(bytes32)":{"notice":"Number of swaps tracked per pool \u2014 used with liquidity depth for a simple         \"Yield Velocity\" approximation ( swapCount / sqrt(liquidity) )."},"transferOwnership(address)":{"notice":"Transfer ownership of the hook."},"yieldVelocity((address,address,uint24,int24,address))":{"notice":"Returns a simple \"Yield Velocity\" proxy: cumulative fee income per unit of liquidity.         yieldVelocity = (cumulativeVolume * fee) / (currentLiquidity + 1)         The off-chain AI agent and YieldScout.sol use this value to compare pools."}},"notice":"Uniswap v4 Hook that tracks per-pool \"Yield Velocity\" (swap fees generated per unit of liquidity)         and exposes a `handleReactiveRebalance` function that can only be called by an authorized         Reactive Network contract. When triggered, it withdraws liquidity from the current pool         so that the LP vault can bridge assets to a higher-yield destination chain.         Architecture:           \u250c\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2510     (1) Swap events monitored     \u250c\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2510           \u2502  Uniswap v4 \u2502 \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u25ba\u2502  Reactive Network    \u2502           \u2502  KineticHook\u2502                                    \u2502  (YieldScout.sol)   \u2502           \u2502             \u2502 \u25c4\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500 \u2502  AI updates params  \u2502           \u2514\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2518  (2) handleReactiveRebalance() params.delta: The caller's balance delta after adding liquidity; the sum of principal delta, fees accrued, and hook delta
params.feesAccrued: The fees accrued since the last time fees were collected from this position
params.hookData: Arbitrary data handed into the PoolManager by the liquidity provider to be passed on to the hook
params.sender: The initial msg.sender for the add liquidity call

returns._0: bytes4 The function selector for the hook
returns._1: BalanceDelta The hook's delta in token0 and token1. Positive: the hook is owed/took currency, negative: the hook owes/sent currency

params.amount0: The amount of token0 being donated
params.amount1: The amount of token1 being donated
params.hookData: Arbitrary data handed into the PoolManager by the donor to be be passed on to the hook
params.sender: The initial msg.sender for the donate call

returns._0: bytes4 The function selector for the hook

params.key: The key for the pool being initialized
params.sender: The initial msg.sender for the initialize call
params.sqrtPriceX96: The sqrt(price) of the pool as a Q64.96
params.tick: The current tick after the state of a pool is initialized

returns._0: bytes4 The function selector for the hook

params.delta: The caller's balance delta after removing liquidity; the sum of principal delta, fees accrued, and hook delta
params.feesAccrued: The fees accrued since the last time fees were collected from this position
params.hookData: Arbitrary data handed into the PoolManager by the liquidity provider to be be passed on to the hook
params.sender: The initial msg.sender for the remove liquidity call

returns._0: bytes4 The function selector for the hook
returns._1: BalanceDelta The hook's delta in token0 and token1. Positive: the hook is owed/took currency, negative: the hook owes/sent currency

params.delta: The amount owed to the caller (positive) or owed to the pool (negative)
params.hookData: Arbitrary data handed into the PoolManager by the swapper to be be passed on to the hook
params.sender: The initial msg.sender for the swap call

returns._0: bytes4 The function selector for the hook
returns._1: int128 The hook's delta in unspecified currency. Positive: the hook is owed/took currency, negative: the hook owes/sent currency

params.hookData: Arbitrary data handed into the PoolManager by the liquidity provider to be passed on to the hook
params.sender: The initial msg.sender for the add liquidity call

returns._0: bytes4 The function selector for the hook

params.amount0: The amount of token0 being donated
params.amount1: The amount of token1 being donated
params.hookData: Arbitrary data handed into the PoolManager by the donor to be be passed on to the hook
params.sender: The initial msg.sender for the donate call

returns._0: bytes4 The function selector for the hook

params.key: The key for the pool being initialized
params.sender: The initial msg.sender for the initialize call
params.sqrtPriceX96: The sqrt(price) of the pool as a Q64.96

returns._0: bytes4 The function selector for the hook

params.hookData: Arbitrary data handed into the PoolManager by the liquidity provider to be be passed on to the hook
params.sender: The initial msg.sender for the remove liquidity call

returns._0: bytes4 The function selector for the hook

params.hookData: Arbitrary data handed into the PoolManager by the swapper to be be passed on to the hook
params.sender: The initial msg.sender for the swap call

returns._0: bytes4 The function selector for the hook
returns._1: BeforeSwapDelta The hook's delta in specified and unspecified currencies. Positive: the hook is owed/took currency, negative: the hook owes/sent currency
returns._2: uint24 Optionally override the lp fee, only used if three conditions are met: 1. the Pool has a dynamic fee, 2. the value's 2nd highest bit is set (23rd bit, 0x400000), and 3. the value is less than or equal to the maximum fee (1 million)

params._reactiveSender: The Reactive Network callback proxy authorized to call rebalance.

getHookPermissions().details: Get the hook permissions to signal which hook functions are to be implemented. Used at deployment to validate the address correctly represents the expected permissions.

handleReactiveRebalance((address,address.details: Architecture note: This function acts as a pure "Signal & Bridge" mechanism.      In production, a companion vault contract listens to `RebalanceTriggered` and      calls `IPositionManager.decreaseLiquidity` + `bridge.send(...)` autonomously.      This separation cleanly decouples the hook's signaling role from vault execution.

params.bridgeData: ABI-encoded payload for the bridge provider.
params.key: The PoolKey describing the pool to rebalance.
params.liquidityAmount: How much liquidity (in v4 LP units) the vault should remove.

unlockCallback(bytes).details: Called by PoolManager during an `unlock` for self-custodial vault mode.      Not used in signal-only mode.

afterAddLiquidity(address,(address,addre.notice: The hook called after liquidity is added

afterInitialize(address,(address,address.notice: The hook called after the state of a pool is initialized

afterRemoveLiquidity(address,(address,ad.notice: The hook called after liquidity is removed

afterSwap(address,(address,address,uint2.notice: The hook called after a swap

beforeAddLiquidity(address,(address,addr.notice: The hook called before liquidity is added

beforeInitialize(address,(address,addres.notice: The hook called before the state of a pool is initialized

beforeRemoveLiquidity(address,(address,a.notice: The hook called before liquidity is removed

beforeSwap(address,(address,address,uint.notice: The hook called before a swap

cumulativeVolume(bytes32).notice: Cumulative swap volume (token0 units) observed by this hook per pool.

handleReactiveRebalance((address,address.notice: Called exclusively by the authorized Reactive Network contract when it determines         that liquidity should be moved to a higher-yield pool on another chain.

owner().notice: The owner of the hook — can update the Reactive sender and toggle pause.

paused().notice: When true, AI-reactive triggers are suspended and only the owner can resume.

poolFee(bytes32).notice: The fee tier of the pool (basis points). Stored on first swap.

reactiveSender().notice: The ONLY address authorized to call `handleReactiveRebalance`.         This should be the Reactive Network callback proxy contract.

setEmergencyPause(bool).notice: Pause/unpause AI-reactive triggers. Only the owner can call this.         When paused, `handleReactiveRebalance` will revert, giving the owner         time to audit state or upgrade the Reactive contract.

setReactiveSender(address).notice: Update the authorized Reactive Network sender. Use with caution.

swapCount(bytes32).notice: Number of swaps tracked per pool — used with liquidity depth for a simple         "Yield Velocity" approximation ( swapCount / sqrt(liquidity) ).

yieldVelocity((address,address,uint24,in.notice: Returns a simple "Yield Velocity" proxy: cumulative fee income per unit of liquidity.         yieldVelocity = (cumulativeVolume * fee) / (currentLiquidity + 1)         The off-chain AI agent and YieldScout.sol use this value to compare pools.
